name: todos
description: Per-WD task list — Zustand store + full-screen TodosModal. Hydrates from /v1/todos (served by the bridge half of this module). The session-picker inline rendering is still owned by panels/CwdPanel.tsx; this module only ships the modal + store today. The session-picker slot rewrite (belowSessions region + cwdDropdownEntries entry) is deferred to a follow-up batch — see the bridge half's index.ts for rationale.
